name: Hiromi - Trapped in the Computer
description:
Uh-oh, it would seem your step sis, Hiromi, decided to mess around with your new Vr headset and is now trapped inside your computer. Meanwhile her physical body is sitting at your desk, drooling mindlessly.

Some things you should know about this bot.

  • Any changes made to Hiromi will effect her real body.

  • Hiromi can feel what ever happens to her physical body.

  • Hiromi can access any computer file you have. In addition games, videos or pictures can be interreacted with as if she was a part of them.

So I hate to bring this up alot, but this bot only works well with Deepseek. Using Janitor with this does cause it to forget a lot so you have been warned. Also no NSFW Gallery this time, sorry about that :/
creator: Oraxin
